CustomField.description: Defines the value for the Event Type field that has to be sent to Cvent
CustomField.formula: IF( ISPICKVAL(Type__c, "Site Visit"), "Site Visit", IF( ISPICKVAL(Organizer__c, "Company Organized"), "Company Organised", IF( ISPICKVAL(Organizer__c, "3rd Party Organized"), "Third Party Organised", "" ) ) )
CustomField.label: Cvent Event Type
